html:
Exclusive to:  

A Cactus is a form of flora from the Reign of Giants DLC found only in the Desert biome. Cactus Flesh can be harvested from the Cactus at the cost of 6 Health. Wearing armor will decrease the amount of damage taken. When harvested it will drop Cactus Flesh during any season, but only in Summer will it drop its Flower.

Cacti cannot be dug up with a Shovel. The player will have to wait for them to regrow in 4 (3 during Spring) days to be able to harvest them again. Unlike most other plants, Cacti can grow back during winter, unaffected by the cold. Therefore, Cactus Flesh can be easily farmed and used in lieu of farmed vegetables during Winter.

Tips

  • Wearing a Bramble Husk in Reign of Giants will allow the player to pick the cacti with no health loss, and also no damage to the armor itself. This makes Wormwood an effective Cactus farmer.
  • The Health lost is mostly negated by using a Football Helmet or Log Suit. With either of these equipped when picking the cactus, one takes only 2 damage and eating the cooked flesh will reduce this to 1.

Trivia

  • Although there appears to be a dug up version shown in image files, there is currently no known way to dig one up.
  • The Cactus is modeled after the typical Barrel Cactus.

Gallery

  • Cactus in the game files.
  • Cactus with flowers.
  • Cactus Picked
  • Unused Dropped Oasis Cactus as an Item

“Sharp but delicious.”
–Wilson
“Spines! My weakness! How did you know?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang not like sharp plant.”
–Wolfgang
“Knives out.”
–Wendy
“PROTECTIVE BARRIER PRESENT. PROCEED WITH CAUTION.”
–WX-78
“A young barrel cactus.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's gonna hurt.”
–Woodie
“Puffer plant.”
–Maxwell
“Intrinsically reactionary!”
–Wagstaff
“It döes have admirable armör.”
–Wigfrid
“It's got more things coming out of it than we do.”
–Webber
“It's fine if you just leave it alone.”
–Walani
“I bet it has a sharp flavor.”
–Warly
“Ye have a sharp taste ye do.”
–Woodlegs
“IT BE POINTY FOODS”
–Wilba
“Ouch Friend”
–Wormwood
“It's almost like it doesn't want to be eaten.”
–Wheeler
“Prickly.”
–Winona
“Spiny and mean, just how I like them.”
–Wortox
“It full of spikes.”
–Wurt
“That's one prickly plant.”
–Walter
“I wonder if it's really worth the bother.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Xương rồng là một dạng thực vật có trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants chỉ được tìm thấy trong quần xã Sa mạc. Thịt xương rồng có thể được thu hoạch từ Xương rồng với giá 6 Máu. Mặc áo giáp sẽ giảm lượng sát thương nhận vào. Khi thu hoạch, nó sẽ rơi ra Thịt xương rồng vào bất kỳ mùa nào, nhưng chỉ vào Mùa hè nó mới rơi ra Hoa.

A '''Cactus''' is a form of flora from the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC found only in the [[Desert]] biome. [[Cactus Flesh]] can be harvested from the Cactus at the cost of 6 [[Health]]. Wearing armor will decrease the amount of damage taken. When harvested it will drop [[Cactus Flesh]] during any season, but only in [[Summer]] will it drop its [[Cactus Flower|Flower]].

Cacti cannot be dug up with a [[Shovel]]. The player will have to wait for them to regrow in 4 (3 during [[Spring]]) days to be able to harvest them again. Unlike most other plants, Cacti can grow back during winter, unaffected by the cold. Therefore, Cactus Flesh can be easily farmed and used in lieu of farmed vegetables during Winter.
=={{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == 
*Wearing a [[Bramble Husk]] in ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' will allow the player to pick the cacti with no health loss, and also no damage to the armor itself. This makes [[Wormwood]] an effective Cactus farmer.
* The Health lost is mostly negated by using a [[Football Helmet]] or [[Log Suit]]. With either of these equipped when picking the cactus, one takes only 2 damage and eating the cooked flesh will reduce this to 1.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
*Although there appears to be a dug up version shown in image files, there is currently no known way to dig one up.
*The Cactus is modeled after the typical [[Wikipedia:Barrel Cactus|Barrel Cactus]].
